template_note: Session metadata for one locked contribution. Copy this file, replace every placeholder, and keep only canonical Phase 38A enum values. This header is documentation/session metadata: Phase 38B validates the individual session values passed to Invoke-HiveMindGovernancePreflight.ps1 (see parameter mapping in agent-session-launch-guide.md), it does not parse or enforce this JSON document, the active_agent_pool, or the temporary_excluded_agents field.
stop_conditions: Repository path is wrong, contains OneDrive, or the folder is not named hive-mind.
Remote is not the canonical Hive|Mind remote.
HEAD is detached or the branch is not the locked expected branch.
Working tree is dirty at session start.
Merge-base does not equal the locked baseline, or the branch is behind it.
Work would require executable, backend, or frontend changes outside write authority.
An unauthorized provider branch or PR contains unknown changes.
Phase 36K would be touched, or an excluded agent receives work.
